mapper.sql: id, name_cn, name_en, scope, resource_type, resource_id, category_id, need_approval, resource_nodes, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_permission_t SET name_cn = #{nameCn}, name_en = #{nameEn}, category_id = #{categoryId}, need_approval = #{needApproval}, resource_nodes = #{resourceNodes}, status = #{status}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t p WHERE p.resource_type = 'api'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM openplatform_v2_category_t c WHERE c.id = p.category_id AND c.path LIKE CONCAT(#{categoryPath}, '%') )
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (p.name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM openplatform_v2_permission_p_t pp WHERE pp.parent_id = p.id AND pp.property_name = 'need_approval' AND pp.property_value = #{needApproval} )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t p WHERE p.resource_type = 'event'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM openplatform_v2_category_t c WHERE c.id = p.category_id AND c.path LIKE CONCAT(#{categoryPath}, '%') )
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (p.name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM openplatform_v2_permission_p_t pp WHERE pp.parent_id = p.id AND pp.property_name = 'need_approval' AND pp.property_value = #{needApproval} )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t p WHERE p.resource_type = 'callback'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM openplatform_v2_category_t c WHERE c.id = p.category_id AND c.path LIKE CONCAT(#{categoryPath}, '%') )
AND p.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND (p.name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.name_en LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.scope LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM openplatform_v2_permission_p_t pp WHERE pp.parent_id = p.id AND pp.property_name = 'need_approval' AND pp.property_value = #{needApproval} )

SELECT FROM openplatform_v2_permission_t WHERE id IN
#{id}
